name: plate_reader
description: Run a target-binding assay on a synthesized batch using the lab's BMG CLARIOstar. Call AFTER hplc_qc confirmed purity. Returns IC50 (nM) and percent inhibition. Lower IC50 is better — <100 nM is a strong hit, 100–1000 nM is worth iterating on, >1000 nM is typically dead. The user must name the target explicitly; do not guess.

batch_id.description: Batch ID from liquid_handler that already passed hplc_qc.
